subcodes.first_line: O my God! These have believed in Thee and in Thy most exalted Word, and have clung to the hem of Thy favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هولاء قد آمنوا بک و بکلمتک العلیا و تشبثوا بذیل الطافک فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for protection
